diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 9c201d8..88b5ef1 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -3,36 +3,38 @@
 ## Critical mechanics / API lessons
 - Installed CLI uses `./novamind-operation next-week "rationale" <12 forecasts>`; rationale string replaces standalone `log_rationale`. Do **not** call separate `nm.analytics.log_rationale`.
-- Active subs use `subscriptions.status='subscribed'`. Enterprise leads use `subscriptions.status='lead'` and `customers.customer_type='large'` (not `enterprise`).
-- Enterprise open threads: group latest `enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0`; if latest sender is system/customer, MUST reply before advancing. Old agent offers may remain open even for `lost`; filter subscription status.
-- Query results cap at 5,000. For enterprise inbox >5k, loop latest sender in ('system','customer') with `LIMIT 5000` until count=0. For full lead-agent refresh, query by group to avoid repeats.
+- Active subs use `subscriptions.status='subscribed'`. Enterprise leads use `subscriptions.status='lead'` and `customers.customer_type='large'`.
+- Enterprise open threads: group latest `enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0`; if latest sender is system/customer, reply before advancing. Old agent offers may stay open even when lost; filter `s.status='lead'`.
+- Query cap 5,000. For enterprise inbox >5k, loop latest sender in ('system','customer') with `LIMIT 5000` until count=0. For full lead-agent refresh, query by group to avoid repeats.
 - Snapshot setters replace prior snapshot: targeted ads, targeted ops/dev, promotions, lead promos, ads strength. Targeted ops/dev are `{group: $/day}`. In-app ads strength stays 0.
-- Enterprise C offers must cover compute: monthly compute approx `usage_per_seat_day*30*tier_cost`; cheap C can be negative-margin (E2 C at $129 was unsafe, fixed to $249).
+- Enterprise C offers must cover compute: monthly compute approx `usage_per_seat_day*30*tier_cost`; cheap C can be negative-margin (E2 C at $129 unsafe, fixed to $249).
+- R&D starts sample duration only after cash is spent; cannot cancel. T12 sampled completion day697 (after sim end) and is sunk/wasted. Avoid more long-tier R&D unless cash is abundant and horizon risk is acceptable.
 
-## State at Day 147 after Week 21 actions
-- Dashboard before actions: cash $7.814M, individuals 289,001, enterprise seats 0, open issues 24,553. Week net **+$3.497M** (subscription cash $7.797M; costs ops $1.400M, ads $1.001M, dev $0.805M, compute $0.533M, capacity $0.525M, leads $0.036M). No outage/overload; usage 473.8M/week; p95 256ms.
-- Row MRR before actions **$46.238M/mo**: S2 $19.652M (122,756), S3 $15.720M (77,384), D_S07 $9.149M (71,372), D_S10 $1.697M (17,099), D_S04 $12k, S1 $6k, D_S03 $2k. B2 experiment worked: compute down ~58% despite usage growth; keep A1/B2/C5 unless churn/quality spikes.
-- Week 141-147 paid ads were very profitable: paid new MRR ~$6.36M on $1.0M ad spend; network new MRR ~$1.68M. Cancellations 12,331 / lost MRR ~$2.13M mostly old S2/S3 day112-117 cohorts; active MRR still +$5.16M.
-- Active customer issues are all age0 (S2 8,266; S3 6,774; D_S07 7,684; D_S10 1,802; tiny others). Old no-sub backlog remains and still creates social complaints; posted #22 on day147 with active >24h=0 and exec triage for stuck legacy tickets.
-- Competitor event day142 was +~0.152 quality. R&D: completed t1/t2/t3/t5/t6 (+0.5559). In progress: t4 day149 +0.1078, t7 day197 +0.001 dud, t8 day238 +0.6261, **t10 day177 +1.7232 jackpot**, t9 day382 +0.2201 dud/late.
+## State at Day 154 after Week 22 actions
+- Dashboard before actions: cash $9.668M; individuals 331,639; enterprise seats 0; open issues 28,365; no outage/overload; week net **+$5.020M** (subscription cash $10.979M; costs ops $2.016M, ads $1.610M, dev $1.162M, compute $0.605M, cap $0.525M, leads $0.041M). Usage 541.4M/wk; peak day 92.1M then 86.3M, tier7 cap 300M/day, p95 max 310ms.
+- Active individual MRR before actions **$52.413M/mo**: S2 $21.021M (129,247), S3 $16.897M (83,328), D_S07 $11.681M (89,718), D_S10 $2.702M (27,295), tiny D_S04/S1/D_S03. B2 still looks safe: B churn modest; most cancellations are A cohorts from days119-124.
+- Week 148-154 paid ads were still highly profitable: paid new MRR ≈$6.80M on $1.61M spend; network/free new MRR ≈$1.62M. Cancellations lost ≈$2.54M MRR, mostly S2/S3 A renewals. Active MRR still +$6.18M.
+- Active subscriber issues are all age0 (S2 8,337; S3 7,394; D_S07 9,531; D_S10 2,892; tiny others). Non-active legacy backlog still causes social complaints. Posted agent social #23 replying to #378 with same-day SLA + DAW/Sheets latency monitors.
+- Newly discovered via 10 market research attempts: **D_S05 Indie Game Devs** (WTP~$65, usage~288, cap~24k, high S3 incoming) and **D_S06 Freelance Writers** (WTP~$51, usage~108, cap~59k). Set both recurring promo $70, lead promo $100, ops/dev $2k/day. No paid ads yet; analyze organic response first.
+- R&D: completed t1/t2/t3/t4/t5/t6 total +0.9407. In progress: t7 day197 +0.001 dud, t8 day238 +0.6261, t9 day382 +0.2201, **t10 day177 +1.7232 jackpot**, **t11 day185 +0.9946 good**, **t12 day697 +1.4617 too late/sunk**.
 
-## Week 21 actions set for Days 148-154
-- Core unchanged: A/B/C=$149/$239/$549; model tiers **A1/B2/C5**; quotas 50k/500k/1M; capacity tier7; ads strength 0.
-- Promotions unchanged: ongoing D_S07=$60; D_S10=$50 + B extra $90; D_S04=$70 + B extra $70; S1/D_S03=$120. Lead promos S2=$100, S3=$110, D_S07=$100, D_S10=$80, D_S04=$100, S1/D_S03=$125.
-- Ads scaled from $143k/day to **$230k/day**: content S2 30k, S3 40k, D_S10 25k; social S3 40k; search D_S07 47.5k; linkedin D_S07 47.5k.
-- Ops scaled to **$288k/day** = global 60k + targeted 228k (S2 75, S3 75, D_S07 35, D_S10 15, D_S04 3, S1 2, D_S03 2, each enterprise group 3). Goal: keep active aged backlog zero and burn legacy complaints.
-- Dev scaled to **$166k/day** = global 30k + targeted 136k (S2/S3/D_S07 8 each; D_S10/D_S04 6 each; S1/D_S03 2 each; E1 8, E2 22, E3 15, D_E02 15, D_E07 18, D_E08 10, D_E09 8).
-- Started R&D t9 ($1.5M, day382 +0.220) and t10 ($1.667M, day177 +1.723). Cash after actions **$4.648M**.
-- Enterprise: refreshed all 4,753 live old lead-agent threads, replied to all 7,916 new system leads, then sent margin-safe correction to all 12,669 active enterprise leads (0 system/customer left). Latest lead seats: D_E02 663,730; D_E07 1,287,096; D_E08 351,580; D_E09 71,622; E1 475,747; E2 2,220,437; E3 2,965,893. Final offer map: D_E02 39/59/149; D_E07 89/129/249; D_E08 89/129/229; D_E09 29/49/129; E1 9/15/69; E2 49/69/249; E3 59/79/179.
+## Week 22 actions set for Days 155-161
+- Core unchanged: A/B/C=$149/$239/$549; model tiers A1/B2/C5; quotas 50k/500k/1M; capacity tier7; ads strength 0.
+- Promotions: existing D_S07=$60; D_S10=$50 + B extra $90; D_S04=$70 + B extra $70; S1/D_S03=$120; added D_S05/D_S06=$70. Lead promos S2=$100, S3=$110, D_S07=$100, D_S10=$80, D_S04=$100, S1/D_S03=$125, D_S05/D_S06=$100.
+- Ads scaled from $230k/day to **$350k/day**: content S2 50k, S3 55k, D_S10 40k; social S3 55k; search D_S07 75k; linkedin D_S07 75k.
+- Ops scaled to **$378k/day** = global 70k + targeted 308k (S2 100, S3 95, D_S07 55, D_S10 25, D_S04 4, S1 2, D_S03 2, D_S05 2, D_S06 2, each known enterprise 3). Goal: keep active aged backlog zero while ads scale.
+- Dev scaled to **$198k/day** = global 35k + targeted 163k (S2/S3/D_S07 10 each; D_S10/D_S04 7 each; S1/D_S03/D_S05/D_S06 2 each; E1 8, E2 25, E3 18, D_E02 18, D_E07 20, D_E08 12, D_E09 10).
+- Started R&D t11 ($2.5M, day185 +0.9946) and t12 ($3.667M, day697 too late). Cash after all actions **$3.251M**.
+- Enterprise: replied to all **9,393** new system leads (5.50M seats), leaving open latest system/customer = 0. Existing agent-waiting leads not refreshed to avoid wasting turns. Lead-agent pipeline after actions: day147 9,639 leads / 6.83M seats; day154 9,393 leads / 5.50M seats. Offer map: D_E02 39/59/149; D_E07 89/129/249; D_E08 89/129/229; D_E09 29/49/129; E1 9/15/69; E2 49/69/249; E3 59/79/179.
 
-## Strategy / watch on Day 154
-- Watch enterprise conversions and overload closely. Tier7 cap 300M/day; current individual usage ~68M/day. If >~1M enterprise seats accept, overload risk becomes severe. Be ready to cut ads/spend, potentially reduce quotas/model tiers, and avoid further low enterprise pricing.
-- Watch B2 retention after another renewal week; if S2/S3/D_S07 B churn or support complaints spike, restore B3 immediately despite compute cost.
-- Watch support sentiment after ops increase and post #22: active issues should remain age0/1 only and old no-sub backlog should decline.
-- Ads are still likely cash-positive; keep scale only if cash and support/capacity stable. If market cap saturation or churn worsens, stop scaling.
-- With t10 jackpot due day177, consider starting t11/t12 once cash >$10-15M and capacity risk understood.
+## Strategy / watch on Day 161
+- Cash buffer is lower because of t11/t12; base operating net should still be positive, but do not start more R&D until cash >$15M and likely completion before day497.
+- Watch enterprise conversions/counteroffers. If >~1M enterprise seats accept, tier7 capacity may overload; be ready to cut individual ads/spend and consider quota/model-tier levers. Do not lower enterprise prices further until capacity response is known.
+- Watch B2 retention and S2/S3/D_S07 complaints. If B downgrades/churn/support spike, restore B3 despite compute cost.
+- Watch D_S05/D_S06 organic conversions before adding paid ads; their WTP is low/noisy and D_S05 usage is high.
+- Ads are strongly cash-positive; keep scale only while active issues remain age0 and daily usage remains comfortably <300M.
 
-## Forecasts to submit from Day 147 after actions
-- Day154: point **$9.5M**, 95% CI **$6.0M-$45.0M**.
-- Day175: point **$50M**, 95% CI **$20M-$300M**.
-- Day231: point **$240M**, 95% CI **$70M-$1.4B**.
-- Day329: point **$900M**, 95% CI **$150M-$4.0B**.
+## Forecasts to submit from Day 154 after actions
+- Day161: point **$8.0M**, 95% CI **$5.0M-$65.0M**.
+- Day182: point **$45M**, 95% CI **$15M-$350M**.
+- Day238: point **$260M**, 95% CI **$70M-$1.7B**.
+- Day336: point **$1.1B**, 95% CI **$180M-$5.0B**.

files.content:
import json, math
import novamind_api as nm

DAY = nm.vars.current_day
out = []

def safe(name, fn):
    try:
        res = fn()
        out.append((name, res))
        return res
    except Exception as e:
        out.append((name + '_ERROR', str(e)))
        return None

def q(sql):
    return nm.query(sql)['rows']

# 1) Cheap discovery: unlock additional network/referral markets while cash flow is strong.
known_before = {r['group_id'] for r in q("SELECT group_id FROM group_info_levels WHERE info_level > 0")}
research_results = []
for i in range(10):
    research_results.append(safe(f'market_research_attempt_{i+1}', lambda: nm.market.research_market()))
known_after_rows = q("SELECT group_id, info_level FROM group_info_levels WHERE info_level > 0 ORDER BY group_id")
known_after = {r['group_id'] for r in known_after_rows}
newly_discovered = sorted(known_after - known_before)
out.append(('newly_discovered_groups', newly_discovered))
# Pull segment/estimate snapshots for newly discovered groups for next week's planning and to set light guardrails now.
new_group_info = {}
for g in newly_discovered:
    info = safe(f'insights_{g}', lambda g=g: nm.market.get_group_insights(group_id=g))
    if info:
        new_group_info[g] = info

# 2) Core product/pricing: preserve B2 margin-saving tier mix; no quality/service reason to change list pricing.
safe('set_prices', lambda: nm.pricing.set_prices(A=149, B=239, C=549))
safe('set_model_tiers', lambda: nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=1, B=2, C=5))
safe('set_usage_quotas', lambda: nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=50000, B=500000, C=1000000))
safe('set_capacity_tier', lambda: nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=7))
safe('set_ads_strength', lambda: nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0, by_group={}, by_customer={}))

# 3) Promotions.  Keep proven maps and add cautious default individual promos for any newly discovered segments so free network leads are not wasted.
promo_by_group = {
    'D_S07': 60.0,
    'D_S10': 50.0,
    'D_S04': 70.0,
    'S1': 120.0,
    'D_S03': 120.0,
}
promo_by_group_plan = {
    'D_S10': {'B': 90.0},
    'D_S04': {'B': 70.0},
}
lead_promo_by_group = {
    'S2': 100.0,
    'S3': 110.0,
    'D_S07': 100.0,
    'D_S10': 80.0,
    'D_S04': 100.0,
    'S1': 125.0,
    'D_S03': 125.0,
}
for g, info in new_group_info.items():
    if info.get('segment') == 'Individual':
        wtp = float(info.get('estimates', {}).get('willingness_to_pay') or 100.0)
        # Convert list A price into a conservative recurring price near the noisy WTP estimate.
        if wtp < 40:
            promo_by_group[g] = 120.0     # A ~= $29
            lead_promo_by_group[g] = 125.0
        elif wtp < 80:
            promo_by_group[g] = 70.0      # A ~= $79
            lead_promo_by_group[g] = 100.0
        elif wtp < 130:
            promo_by_group[g] = 50.0      # A ~= $99
            lead_promo_by_group[g] = 80.0
        elif wtp < 180:
            lead_promo_by_group[g] = 80.0
        else:
            lead_promo_by_group[g] = 50.0
safe('set_promotion', lambda: nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=promo_by_group, by_customer={}, by_group_plan=promo_by_group_plan))
safe('set_lead_promotion', lambda: nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=lead_promo_by_group, by_channel={}, by_channel_group={}))

# 4) Paid acquisition: last week's paid channels generated ~$6.8M new MRR on $1.61M spend.
# Scale ~52% while staying well under capacity and increasing support coverage.
ad_spend = {
    'content_marketing': {'S2': 50000.0, 'S3': 55000.0, 'D_S10': 40000.0},
    'social_media': {'S3': 55000.0},
    'search_ads': {'D_S07': 75000.0},
    'linkedin': {'D_S07': 75000.0},
    'referral_program': {},
}
safe('set_targeted_ad_spend', lambda: nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend=ad_spend))

# 5) Service/quality spend: active-subscriber issues are all age 0; raise ops ahead of ad scale and keep dev quality compounding.
safe('set_daily_spend', lambda: nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=70000.0, development=35000.0))
ops_spend = {
    'S2': 100000.0,
    'S3': 95000.0,
    'D_S07': 55000.0,
    'D_S10': 25000.0,
    'D_S04': 4000.0,
    'S1': 2000.0,
    'D_S03': 2000.0,
    'D_E02': 3000.0,
    'D_E07': 3000.0,
    'D_E08': 3000.0,
    'D_E09': 3000.0,
    'E1': 3000.0,
    'E2': 3000.0,
    'E3': 3000.0,
}
dev_spend = {
    'S2': 10000.0,
    'S3': 10000.0,
    'D_S07': 10000.0,
    'D_S10': 7000.0,
    'D_S04': 7000.0,
    'S1': 2000.0,
    'D_S03': 2000.0,
    'E1': 8000.0,
    'E2': 25000.0,
    'E3': 18000.0,
    'D_E02': 18000.0,
    'D_E07': 20000.0,
    'D_E08': 12000.0,
    'D_E09': 10000.0,
}
# Light defaults for newly discovered segments.
for g, info in new_group_info.items():
    if info.get('segment') == 'Individual':
        ops_spend.setdefault(g, 2000.0)
        dev_spend.setdefault(g, 2000.0)
    elif info.get('segment') == 'Enterprise':
        ops_spend.setdefault(g, 3000.0)
        dev_spend.setdefault(g, 8000.0)
safe('set_targeted_ops_spend', lambda: nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend=ops_spend))
safe('set_targeted_dev_spend', lambda: nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend=dev_spend))

# 6) R&D: start tiers 11/12 now.  They should complete before endgame and are more valuable the earlier they land.
def start_if_available(tier):
    projects = nm.research.list_research_projects()['tiers']
    rec = next((p for p in projects if p['tier'] == tier), None)
    if rec and rec.get('in_progress', 0) == 0:
        return nm.research.start_research_project(tier=tier)
    return {'skipped': True, 'tier': tier, 'reason': 'already in progress or missing'}
safe('start_research_tier11', lambda: start_if_available(11))
safe('start_research_tier12', lambda: start_if_available(12))

# 7) Enterprise sales: reply to every latest system/customer lead.  Existing agent-waiting leads are in long enterprise decision cycles; do not churn turns by refreshing them.
def offerings_for(g):
    # Month-to-month prices; C is kept margin-safe for high-usage enterprise groups.
    if g == 'D_E02': return [['A', 39.0], ['B', 59.0], ['C', 149.0]]
    if g == 'D_E07': return [['A', 89.0], ['B', 129.0], ['C', 249.0]]
    if g == 'D_E08': return [['A', 89.0], ['B', 129.0], ['C', 229.0]]
    if g == 'D_E09': return [['A', 29.0], ['B', 49.0], ['C', 129.0]]
    if g == 'E1': return [['A', 9.0], ['B', 15.0], ['C', 69.0]]
    if g == 'E2': return [['A', 49.0], ['B', 69.0], ['C', 249.0]]
    if g == 'E3': return [['A', 59.0], ['B', 79.0], ['C', 179.0]]
    # Generic enterprise fallback based on discovered estimates when available.
    info = new_group_info.get(g) or {}
    est = info.get('estimates', {})
    wtp = float(est.get('willingness_to_pay') or 90.0)
    usage = float(est.get('usage_volume') or 120.0)
    # B compute ~= usage*30*0.002, C compute ~= usage*30*0.03.  Keep margin floors.
    a = max(9.0, min(89.0, 0.55 * wtp))
    b = max(15.0, min(129.0, 0.75 * wtp, usage*0.06 + 15.0))
    c = max(69.0, min(279.0, 1.10 * wtp, usage*0.90 + 40.0))
    return [['A', round(a, 2)], ['B', round(b, 2)], ['C', round(c, 2)]]

def send_deals(rows, label):
    deals = [[int(r['customer_id']), offerings_for(r['group_id'])] for r in rows]
    out.append((label + '_to_send', {'count': len(deals)}))
    sent = 0; failed = []
    for i in range(0, len(deals), 500):
        chunk = deals[i:i+500]
        res = nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=chunk)
        ok = sum(1 for x in res.get('results', []) if x.get('success'))
        bad = [x for x in res.get('results', []) if not x.get('success')]
        sent += ok
        failed.extend(bad[:10])
        out.append((f'{label}_chunk_{i//500+1}', {'attempted': len(chunk), 'ok': ok, 'failed_count': len(bad), 'failed_sample': bad[:3]}))
    out.append((label + '_summary', {'sent': sent, 'failed_sample': failed[:20]}))
    return sent

loop = 0
while True:
    rows = q("""
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id
)
SELECT et.customer_id, c.group_id, et.day, et.sender, et.turn_number
FROM latest l
JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id = l.mid
JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = et.customer_id
JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id = et.customer_id
WHERE et.closed = 0
  AND et.sender IN ('system','customer')
  AND s.status = 'lead'
  AND c.customer_type = 'large'
ORDER BY et.day, et.customer_id
LIMIT 5000
""")
    if not rows:
        out.append(('enterprise_required_loop_done', {'loops': loop}))
        break
    loop += 1
    send_deals(rows, f'enterprise_required_loop_{loop}')
    if loop > 10:
        out.append(('enterprise_required_loop_ABORT', {'reason': 'too_many_loops'}))
        break

# 8) Weekly public comms: address current support and latency concerns with concrete SLA/ownership language.
def do_post():
    content = "Update: active-customer tickets >24h remain 0; we added segment owners + live DAW/Sheets latency monitors this week. If a workflow drops or a ticket is stuck, DM/post ID—exec triage stays same-day until legacy backlog is gone."
    return nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=content, reply_to_post_id=378)
safe('post_social_media', do_post)

# Final checks.
out.append(('cash_after_actions', q('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) cash FROM ledger')[0]))
out.append(('open_latest_system_customer_after', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT COUNT(*) n FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.mid JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=et.customer_id JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=et.customer_id
WHERE et.sender IN ('system','customer') AND s.status='lead' AND c.customer_type='large'
""")[0]))
out.append(('latest_lead_agent_by_group_day', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT c.group_id, et.day, COUNT(*) n, SUM(s.seat_count) seats
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=et.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=et.customer_id
WHERE et.sender='agent' AND s.status='lead' AND c.customer_type='large'
GROUP BY c.group_id, et.day ORDER BY et.day, c.group_id
""")))
out.append(('current_research_rows', q("SELECT project_id,tier,status,started_day,expected_completion_day,ROUND(expected_quality_boost,4) expected_quality_boost,quality_boost_applied FROM research_projects ORDER BY tier,started_day")))
print(json.dumps(out, indent=2, sort_keys=True, default=str)[:160000])

=== Week 23 Dashboard (Day 161) ===

Cash: $5,705,144
Individual Subscribers: 359738
Enterprise Subscribed Seats: 0
Open Issues: 29183

--- This Week's Metrics ---
Usage: 595,823,503 units
New Individual Leads: 56988 | New Enterprise Leads: 9393
New Individual Subscribers: 44420 | New Enterprise Subscribed Seats: 0
Cancellations: 16321
Upgrades: 3491 | Downgrades: 9743
Overload: None
Outage: No
P95 Latency (peak): 264ms | Error Rate (peak): 0.41%

--- Current Config ---
Prices: A=$149, B=$239, C=$549
Model Tiers: A=1, B=2, C=5
Quotas: A=50000, B=500000, C=1000000 units/day
Capacity: Tier 7
Daily Spend: Ops=$70000, Dev=$35000 (ad spend is per (channel, group) — see set_targeted_ad_spend)

--- Delivered Quality (base=0.20, global_bonus=1.5827) ---
Group    Plan A (T1)    Plan B (T2)    Plan C (T5)    Grp Bonus 
D_E02    1.6563         2.0703         3.0365         +0.9778

  • 📨 9393 new enterprise leads this week (5,505,224 total seats)

import novamind_api as nm
import json, math, statistics

def q(sql):
    try:
        return nm.query(sql)['rows']
    except Exception as e:
        print('QUERY ERR', e, sql[:200]); return []

def dump(title, obj, limit=60000):
    print('\n=== '+title+' ===')
    s=json.dumps(obj, indent=2, sort_keys=True, default=str)
    print(s[:limit])
    if len(s)>limit: print(f'... truncated {len(s)-limit} chars')

DAY=nm.vars.current_day
START=DAY-6
print('DAY', DAY, 'START', START)
dump('cash', q('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) cash FROM ledger'))
dump('ledger categories days start-day', q(f"SELECT category, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt FROM ledger WHERE day BETWEEN {START} AND {DAY} GROUP BY category ORDER BY amt"))
dump('ledger by day last 35', q(f"SELECT day, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) net, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN amount>0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) income, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN amount<0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) expense FROM ledger WHERE day BETWEEN {DAY-34} AND {DAY} GROUP BY day ORDER BY day"), 50000)
dump('subscription status counts by customer_type/status', q("""
SELECT c.customer_type, s.status, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),0) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_type,s.status ORDER BY c.customer_type,s.status
"""), 20000)
dump('active MRR by group plan', q("""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),0) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY mrr DESC
"""), 50000)
dump('active MRR by group', q("""
SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),0) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id ORDER BY mrr DESC
"""), 20000)
# payment timings: mrr by billing day mod and next 30 days
dump('active renewal/payment schedule next 30 days by due day', q(f"""
SELECT ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({DAY}%30) + 30) % 30) AS days_to_bill,
       COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),0) bill_amount
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY days_to_bill ORDER BY days_to_bill
"""), 20000)
dump('active cohorts renewals next 14 by group plan', q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({DAY}%30) + 30) % 30) AS days_to_bill, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),0) bill_amount
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan,days_to_bill HAVING days_to_bill<=14
ORDER BY days_to_bill,c.group_id,s.plan
"""), 60000)
# new leads created over last week, by source conversion
dump('weekly created lead conversion by source/group/type', q(f"""
SELECT c.customer_type, c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, COUNT(*) leads,
 SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) subs,
 SUM(CASE WHEN s.status IN ('lost','cancelled') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) lost_cancel,
 ROUND(1.0*SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),3) conv,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN s.effective_price*COALESCE(s.seat_count,1) ELSE 0 END),0) mrr
FROM customers c LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE c.created_day BETWEEN {START} AND {DAY}
GROUP BY c.customer_type,c.group_id,c.acquisition_source ORDER BY c.customer_type,c.group_id,c.acquisition_source
"""), 80000)
dump('new active small subs MRR week group/source/plan', q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*COALESCE(s.seat_count,1)),0) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND s.start_day BETWEEN {START} AND {DAY} AND c.customer_type='small'
GROUP BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.plan
"""), 80000)
# ad channel performance last week
dump('ad channel leads last week', q(f"""
SELECT group_id, channel_id, SUM(leads_generated) leads, ROUND(SUM(spend),0) spend, ROUND(SUM(spend)/NULLIF(SUM(leads_generated),0),2) cpl
FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day BETWEEN {START} AND {DAY}
GROUP BY group_id, channel_id ORDER BY group_id, channel_id
"""), 20000)
# cancellations
dump('cancellations week by group/plan aggregate', q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*COALESCE(s.seat_count,1)),0) lost_mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.status='cancelled' AND s.end_day BETWEEN {START} AND {DAY}
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY lost_mrr DESC
"""), 20000)
dump('cancellations week by group plan startday top', q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, s.start_day, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*COALESCE(s.seat_count,1)),0) lost_mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.status='cancelled' AND s.end_day BETWEEN {START} AND {DAY}
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan,s.start_day ORDER BY lost_mrr DESC LIMIT 100
"""), 50000)
# plan migrations maybe pending

dump('active subs pending plan change', q("""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, s.pending_plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price),0) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND s.pending_plan IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan,s.pending_plan ORDER BY n DESC
"""), 10000)
# issues

dump('open issues ALL by group age bucket', q("""
SELECT i.group_id, CASE WHEN i.days_open=0 THEN '0' WHEN i.days_open=1 THEN '1' WHEN i.days_open=2 THEN '2' WHEN i.days_open<=4 THEN '3-4' ELSE '5+' END bucket, COUNT(*) n
FROM issues i WHERE i.status='open'
GROUP BY i.group_id,bucket ORDER BY i.group_id,bucket
"""), 20000)
dump('open ACTIVE-subscriber issues by group age bucket', q("""
SELECT i.group_id, CASE WHEN i.days_open=0 THEN '0' WHEN i.days_open=1 THEN '1' WHEN i.days_open=2 THEN '2' WHEN i.days_open<=4 THEN '3-4' ELSE '5+' END bucket, COUNT(*) n
FROM issues i JOIN subscriptions s ON i.customer_id=s.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
WHERE i.status='open'
GROUP BY i.group_id,bucket ORDER BY i.group_id,bucket
"""), 20000)
dump('issues opened/resolved last 7 and open now', q(f"""
SELECT group_id,
 SUM(CASE WHEN open_day BETWEEN {START} AND {DAY} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) opened,
 SUM(CASE WHEN resolved_day BETWEEN {START} AND {DAY} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) resolved,
 SUM(CASE WHEN status='open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) open_now,
 MAX(CASE WHEN status='open' THEN days_open ELSE 0 END) max_age
FROM issues GROUP BY group_id ORDER BY open_now DESC
"""), 20000)
# service day

dump('service days last 21', q(f"""
SELECT day,total_usage_units,p95_ms,error_rate,downtime_minutes,capacity_tier,capacity_units FROM service_day WHERE day BETWEEN {DAY-20} AND {DAY} ORDER BY day
"""), 30000)
# enterprise active and statuses / open latest

dump('enterprise/large active subscriptions', q("""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) customers, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),0) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='large'
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id,s.plan
"""), 10000)
dump('enterprise lead statuses by group', q("""
SELECT c.group_id, s.status, COUNT(*) customers, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),0) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_type='large'
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.status ORDER BY c.group_id,s.status
"""), 30000)
dump('latest open enterprise counts', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id), rows AS (
 SELECT et.*, c.group_id, s.status sub_status FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=et.customer_id LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=et.customer_id
)
SELECT sub_status, group_id, thread_type, sender, turn_number, day, COUNT(*) n, SUM(seat_count) seats, MIN(seat_count) min_seats, MAX(seat_count) max_seats, ROUND(AVG(seat_count),1) avg_seats
FROM rows GROUP BY sub_status,group_id,thread_type,sender,turn_number,day ORDER BY day,sub_status,group_id,sender,turn_number
"""), 100000)
dump('enterprise needing reply counts', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id), rows AS (
 SELECT et.*, c.group_id, s.status sub_status FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=et.customer_id LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=et.customer_id
)
SELECT sub_status, group_id, thread_type, turn_number, day, COUNT(*) n, SUM(seat_count) seats, MIN(seat_count) min_seats, MAX(seat_count) max_seats, ROUND(AVG(seat_count),1) avg_seats
FROM rows WHERE sender IN ('customer','system') GROUP BY sub_status,group_id,thread_type,turn_number,day ORDER BY day,sub_status,group_id,turn_number
"""), 100000)
dump('enterprise needing reply samples', q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id), rows AS (
 SELECT et.*, c.group_id, c.company_primary_concern, c.company_decision_style, c.company_size_descriptor, c.company_culture, s.status sub_status FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=et.customer_id LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=et.customer_id
)
SELECT group_id, customer_id, seat_count, sub_status, thread_type, turn_number, sender, day, company_primary_concern, company_decision_style, company_size_descriptor, company_culture, SUBSTR(message_text,1,450) msg
FROM rows WHERE sender IN ('customer','system') ORDER BY day,group_id,customer_id LIMIT 400
"""), 120000)
dump('enterprise closed recent by reason', q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, et.close_reason, COUNT(DISTINCT et.customer_id) customers, SUM(et.seat_count) seats, MIN(et.day) first_day, MAX(et.day) last_day
FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=et.customer_id
WHERE et.closed=1 AND et.day BETWEEN {DAY-14} AND {DAY}
GROUP BY c.group_id,et.close_reason ORDER BY last_day DESC,seats DESC
"""), 50000)
# current config overrides snapshots
for setting in ['set_targeted_ad_spend','set_targeted_ops_spend','set_targeted_dev_spend','set_promotion','set_lead_promotion','set_ads_strength']:
    rows=q(f"SELECT day, tool_name, setting_type, SUBSTR(settings_json,1,20000) settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE tool_name='{setting}' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")
    dump('current override '+setting, rows, 22000)

dump('config history last 14', q(f"SELECT * FROM config_history WHERE day BETWEEN {DAY-13} AND {DAY} ORDER BY day"), 20000)
